feat.name: Undying Beast
feat.text: You can be injured by non-silver sources but recover with staggering speed. When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points by non-silver damage and don't immediately die from a death effect or a high dying value, you stabilize immediately afterward. You gain the wounded condition as normal.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
